content: Maybe some people already asked for it, but it would be very nice to be able to put multiple backgrounds setups and have them change randomly in that selection

The traphase timer is too short. since you guys can’t figure out how to stop the game from force quitting. My device can handle large games for some reason it alsways force quits once every match and if im unlucky every turn. Atleast give us time to reconnect every single match I disconnect it’s really frustrating specially when I’m about to win plus it’s extremely laggy. Make the extra time 30 seconds once a match for each player for example it’s my turn currently then it suddenly force quits once the timer runs out while I’m trying to reconnect there should be a second timer that counts down 30 seconds if that runs out then force surrender but if I Atleast played 1 card when it forced disconnect then pass the turn if I still not able to comeback from the extended 30 sec timer. Atleast in story mode there’s no timer you can resume it whenever.
